scripts.build: npm run build:auth-core && npm run build:app
scripts.clean:all: rm -rf auth-core/dist frontend-fz/dist frontend-mm/dist && find auth-core frontend-fz frontend-mm -maxdepth 1 -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -type f -delete
scripts.rebuild:all: npm run clean:all && npm run build:auth-core && npm run build:app && npm run build:mm
